title: Fatty Indian Chicken Tikka Masala
description: A rich and flavorful Indian dish featuring chicken cooked in a creamy tomato sauce with treacle and soffritto base, perfect for a cold winter night. This recipe is designed to be anti-inflammatory friendly and packed with energizing ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together treacle, garam masala, turmeric, and cayenne pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the treacle mixture.
Let the chicken marinate for 30 minutes.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion to the skillet and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
While the chicken is baking, heat the canned tomato and heavy cream in a saucepan over medium heat.
Stir the sauce constantly until it is heated through and slightly thickened.
Remove the chicken from the oven and add it to the saucepan with the tomato sauce.
